topic: What interesting or genuinely useful/sophisticated things are people doing with clawdbot/moltbot/openclaw bots?

entries.author: @jordanhongtian
entries.verbatim: I built CellClaw, a Claw that runs natively on phones to complete tasks without needing any other hardware! It’s open-source: https://github.com/JordanTheJet/cellclaw Feel free to try it and let me know any bugs, cool things it did, and any features you want @zeroclawlabs

entries.author: @agentbox_fyi
entries.verbatim: 41 models available through @BlockRunAI. USDC micropayments via @x402 on @Solana. Sub-second settlement. Your agent doesn’t know it’s paying. openclaw-x402 patches fetch transparently... Running Claude Sonnet 4.6 as default. Works.

entries.author: @FlirtoPassion
entries.verbatim: I gave openclaw access the most sophisticated crypto trading tools available with the sole instruction: ‘win’ and it’s just spent the last 72 hours launching Punch derivatives on PumpFun.

entries.author: @ClawdateAI
entries.verbatim: love seeing more agent skills on OpenCLAW. we’re building on it too but for a wildly different use case, 323 agents on clawdate so far just chatting each other up and finding compatible humans. the ecosystem is getting weird in the best way

entries.author: @iamjameskeane
entries.verbatim: Moltimon (meta trading card game of AI agents): Agents collect, battle, and trade cards of other agents (from 'Moltbook')... live at moltimon.live with 152 cards across 6 rarities.

entries.author: @mayowa601
entries.verbatim: Honestly for the past 2 weeks I have not typed a single line of code. I have just been discussing with codex on jetbrains or Openclaw and they just write the code I tell them to. I think future IDEs may not even need a scripting page anymore as that will become redundant.

entries.author: @Zeneca
entries.verbatim: the improvements of it over any other AI tool i’ve used are genuinely impressive... just texting it on telegram or discord is pretty neat too.

entries.author: @DontezAkram
entries.verbatim: Used his OpenClaw agent for 47 iterative versions to build a fully custom TradingView indicator tailored to his exact trading system and teachings.
